evaluation.overall_comment: This translation suffers from critical structural and formatting failures that severely compromise its quality. It contains untranslated French blocks, an abrupt English instruction, and intrusive meta-commentary that breaks the podcast dialogue format entirely. While the Spanish segments that do exist generally convey the original technical meaning with acceptable terminology, the pervasive mixing of languages and structural artifacts render the document unreliable and unreadable as a functional translation. A complete revision is required to remove all foreign text and meta-instructions, ensure full Spanish coverage, and restore the intended conversational flow.
